analyses.summary: Demo analysis: the caller showed confusion about the repair question and the agent ended the call without creating a clear human callback path.

parameterResults.title: Caller risk or friction handled
parameterResults.evidence: Caller said they could not understand and would talk to someone else.
parameterResults.reasoningSummary: The agent acknowledged the confusion but did not offer a clear human follow-up or callback.

parameterResults.title: Clear next step confirmed
parameterResults.evidence: The call ended with no confirmed callback owner or timeframe.
parameterResults.reasoningSummary: The caller left without a next step.

recommendations.title: Add a confusion recovery branch
recommendations.detail: When a caller says they do not understand, the agent should simplify the question and offer a human callback instead of ending the call.
recommendations.promptPatch: If the caller sounds confused, say: "No problem, I can have a team member call you back. What is the best number and time to reach you?"
recommendations.suggestedChange: Add a caller-confusion branch to the prompt with a required callback offer.

recommendations.title: Make callback confirmation mandatory
recommendations.detail: The agent should confirm who will follow up and when before closing calls where the caller asks to speak with someone else.
recommendations.promptPatch: Before ending any unresolved call, confirm: "A team member will call you back at [time/contact]."
recommendations.suggestedChange: Add a HighLevel goal/action for human callback when a caller requests another person.

useActions.reason: Caller said they would talk to Anita after not understanding the agent.
useActions.snippet: Sorry. I can't understand. I will talk to Anita.

analyses.summary: Demo analysis: the call captured the project direction but could be improved by collecting preferred callback timing and budget comfort earlier.

parameterResults.title: Timeline and urgency qualified
parameterResults.evidence: Caller shared a rough start window.
parameterResults.reasoningSummary: Timeline was captured, but callback timing could be more explicit.

recommendations.title: Capture preferred callback time
recommendations.detail: Add a lightweight check for the best callback time so sales can follow up when the caller is available.
recommendations.promptPatch: After collecting contact details, ask: "What is the best time for our team to call you back?"
recommendations.suggestedChange: Add a new observability parameter for preferred callback time capture.

useActions.reason: Caller appears qualified; review transcript before sales callback.
useActions.snippet: Project direction and timeline were captured, but preferred callback time was not explicit.

profiles.name: Business Lead Agent A Observability
profiles.parameterVersionDescription: A reusable starter checklist for judging whether a Voice AI agent captured the caller need, contact details, urgency, next step, and human-review signals.

versions.name: Default lead qualification
versions.description: A reusable starter checklist for judging whether a Voice AI agent captured the caller need, contact details, urgency, next step, and human-review signals.

parameters.title: Project or issue need captured
parameters.description: Evaluate whether the agent clearly identified why the caller contacted the business and captured the core project, service need, or issue in enough detail for a human team member to act.
parameters.recommendation: Update the agent objective or script to ask one direct question about the caller need before moving to next steps.
parameters.promptGuidance: Ask: "What would you like help with today?" Then summarize the need back in one short sentence.

parameters.title: Contact details captured
parameters.description: Evaluate whether the agent captured the caller name and at least one usable contact method or confirmed that HighLevel already has enough contact information.
parameters.recommendation: Add an explicit contact capture step before the call closes, including name confirmation when needed.
parameters.promptGuidance: Before ending the call, confirm the caller name and the best callback number or email.

parameters.title: Timeline and urgency qualified
parameters.description: Evaluate whether the agent asked when the caller needs help, whether the request is urgent, or whether there is a preferred callback/service timeline.
parameters.recommendation: Coach the agent to ask one timing question so the team can prioritize the lead or support request.
parameters.promptGuidance: Ask: "When are you hoping to get this handled?" or "Is this urgent or flexible?"

parameters.title: Clear next step confirmed
parameters.description: Evaluate whether the agent ended with a concrete next step, such as a callback owner, appointment, expected follow-up window, or human handoff.
parameters.recommendation: Update the script so every successful intake call closes with who will follow up and when.
parameters.promptGuidance: End with: "A team member will follow up [timeframe] about [caller need]."

parameters.title: Caller risk or friction handled
parameters.description: Evaluate whether the agent noticed and responded appropriately to frustration, confusion, repeated objections, pricing pressure, callback demands, or requests needing human intervention.
parameters.recommendation: Add a recovery branch for frustrated or high-intent callers so the agent acknowledges the concern and routes it to a human.
parameters.promptGuidance: If the caller sounds frustrated, asks for pricing, or requests a human, acknowledge it and create a clear callback/handoff.
